query_normalized: shuttermuse: capture-time photography guidance with mllms computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on the technical optimization of MLLMs via quantization to reduce latency and model size, which is a distinct construct from the user's question about using MLLMs to provide real-time photography guidance (a specific application domain). While both involve MLLMs, the paper does not measure the mechanism of photography guidance, the specific variables of capture-time feedback, or the empirical population of photographers, failing to meet any of the inclusion criteria (a-f) for a
